name: Portable Hole
description: This fine black cloth, soft as silk, is folded up to the dimensions of a handkerchief. It unfolds into a circular sheet 6 feet in diameter.

unfold.effect: Unfold and place on solid surface to create hole
unfold.placement: On or against a solid surface

fold.effect: Close hole by taking hold of edges and folding up
fold.contents_trapped: Creatures or objects inside remain in extradimensional space

escape_from_closed.on_success: Creature forces way out, appears within 5 feet

air_supply.closed_hole_air: 1 hour of breathing divided by number of breathing creatures

danger_astral_gate.warning: Placing inside Bag of Holding, Heward's Handy Haversack, or similar extradimensional item
danger_astral_gate.effect: Destroys both items and opens gate to Astral Plane
danger_astral_gate.gate_location: Where item was placed inside other
danger_astral_gate.suction: Creatures within 10 feet without Total Cover sucked through
